payload.answer: I can’t reliably identify which memory you mean by “the thing from yesterday.” Please choose one of these repair options:
citations: For context, Remember the thing from yesterday.
repair_options: Clarify which event, task, or note from yesterday you mean.
Provide a short description or keywords so I can distinguish it from other memories.
If you want, I can treat this as a new memory once you specify the content.
If there are multiple possible ‘yesterday’ items, list them and I can help you pick the right one.
